summary.headline: ADM announces CFO Ray Young to transition to Vice Chairman role.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company announced that Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Ray G. Young will assume the additional role of Vice Chairman. Young will transition from his CFO role once a successor is identified. The company began searching for a new CFO with assistance from a leading independent search firm. Chairman and CEO Juan Luciano praised Young's contributions to ADM's transformation and financial performance.

leadership_changes.name: Ray G. Young
leadership_changes.role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

extraction_notes: Numbers from Exhibit 99.1; cover sheet only had Item references
